name: 9 iron sims
about: 9 Iron Sims is a premium golf simulation venue in Billings, Montana, featuring state-of-the-art technology including GOLFZON and UNEEKOR launch monitors with 15ft hitting screens. The facility offers a tranquil atmosphere with ample parking and a welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels. In addition to golf, they also provide Bocce Ball as a multi-sport option. The venue operates on a booking system that requires a $10 monthly membership for reservations and offers club fitting services with Krank and PXG clubs.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium GOLFZON and UNEEKOR launch monitors for accurate data
15ft hitting screens for immersive golf simulation
Tranquil atmosphere and ample parking for a comfortable experience
Multi-sport option with Bocce Ball available
On-site club fitting with Krank and PXG brands

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs or take advantage of their custom club fitting services with Krank and PXG clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to play 18 holes, but typical golf simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 9 Iron Sims appears to be family-friendly with a welcoming atmosphere and multi-sport options like Bocce Ball that could appeal to children.
